info.name: OFeed Server API Scenarios
info.description:
Scenario-driven REST API collection for the OFeed server.

Important notes:
- Configure a Postman environment before running the collection.
- XML and image file uploads use paths relative to apps/server/postman. For Newman use --working-dir apps/server/postman.
- validateXml defaults to false so local runs do not depend on fetching the external IOF XSD.
- Password reset confirm is optional and requires passwordResetToken plus runPasswordResetConfirm=true.
- Event image upload and public image fetch are optional and require runEventImageScenario=true plus working public storage configuration on the server.
- External import defaults to ORIS because it runs without an Eventor API key. Switch provider/api key in the environment when needed.
